text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Kikuka Sho. Yaeno Muteki doesn't
seem even a bit nervous. In fact, she's quite calm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, something seems off about her when
she runs into Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be struggling, lacking the
competitive spirit she had at the Japanese Derby.
